ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "challenge_tutorial" TEXT /* Associated challenge or tutorial, if applicable */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (F=Full day, H=Half day) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., hackathon, panel discussion, workshop) */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Whether registration is open for the event */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, student, professional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the conference */,
  "is_student" INTEGER /* Whether the participant is a student */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering for the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the registration */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker */,
  "presentation_title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation given by the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the speaker's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_level" TEXT /* Level of sponsorship (e.g., gold, silver, bronze) */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_date" TEXT /* Date when the sponsorship was confirmed */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to the sponsor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the sponsor organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the sponsor organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitors" (
  "exhibitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibitor */,
  "exhibitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibitor */,
  "booth_number" INTEGER /* Booth number of the exhibitor */,
  "exhibitor_description" TEXT /* Description of the products or services showcased by the exhibitor */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the exhibitor's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the exhibitor's logo */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the exhibitor organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the exhibitor organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "speakers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of speaker IDs for the session */,
  "moderator" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator for the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, panel, hands-on) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_moderator FOREIGN KEY ("moderator") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., presentation, handout, link) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who uploaded the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
